faqs.question: What does commercial pest control cost in West Farms?
faqs.answer: Commercial pest control in West Farms ranges from $175 to $1,500 per month depending on your business size, type of establishment, pest pressure, and service frequency. We offer free inspections and customized quotes tailored to your specific needs and budget.

faqs.question: How often should my West Farms business receive pest control service?
faqs.answer: Most West Farms commercial properties benefit from monthly service, though restaurants and food-related businesses typically require bi-weekly or weekly visits to maintain health code compliance. We'll assess your property and recommend the optimal schedule during your free consultation.

faqs.question: Do you provide pest control for restaurants in West Farms?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in restaurant and food service pest control in West Farms. Our programs meet all NYC health department requirements and include comprehensive inspections, treatment, sanitation recommendations, and documentation to help you pass inspections and maintain a pest-free kitchen and dining area.

faqs.question: Are your commercial pest control treatments safe for businesses?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and Integrated Pest Management (IPM) techniques that are safe for employees, customers, and the environment. Our technicians work around your schedule to minimize disruption and can provide after-hours service for sensitive commercial environments in West Farms.
